**Log tail:**
- [narration] You open your eyes. Straw beneath you, the smell of wet rice, a low roof you do not know. A cold spring ŌĆö the ninth year of An'ei ŌĆö though the year is as lost to you as your name.
- [narration] S┼Źan: "You're awake." S┼Źan the physician sits back on his heels. "No kami carried you off, whatever the village wants to believe. A flood took you, and a blow to the head took the rest. Bodies forget. Given work and rice, they also mend."
- [narration] You take stock of yourself: bruised, hollow, half-starved ŌĆö but breathing.
- [narration] Rice lies scattered across the Kurosawa grain-store floor. Spilled stores are waste ŌĆö and clearing waste is a kind of work, if you set your hands to it.

**Save (base64 ŌĆö `__qa.load()` to reproduce):**
``

## 2026-07-04T23:56:03+0200 ŌĆö if-your-going-to

**Note:**
If your going to show me scenarios then the dev menu has to be wider because scenarios is cut off

**Where:** seed 20260626 ┬Ę day 0 tick 0 ┬Ę kura ┬Ę R0 ┬Ę tier 0 ┬Ę tab work ┬Ę variants {} ┬Ę 1496├Ś718@2x ┬Ę url /
**Element:** div ŌĆö "SettingsVariantsScenariosSpeed1├Ś2├Ś4├Ś8├Ś16├ŚJumpŌåÆ Phase 2ŌåÆ Asce" ┬Ę `html > body > div:nth-of-type(2) > div:nth-of-type(2)` ┬Ę @1274,152 214├Ś558
**Screenshot:** `2026-07-04T23-37-55-080f37/2026-07-04T23-56-03.png`

**Log tail:**
- [narration] You open your eyes. Straw beneath you, the smell of wet rice, a low roof you do not know. A cold spring ŌĆö the ninth year of An'ei ŌĆö though the year is as lost to you as your name.
- [narration] S┼Źan: "You're awake." S┼Źan the physician sits back on his heels. "No kami carried you off, whatever the village wants to believe. A flood took you, and a blow to the head took the rest. Bodies forget. Given work and rice, they also mend."
- [narration] You take stock of yourself: bruised, hollow, half-starved ŌĆö but breathing.
- [narration] Rice lies scattered across the Kurosawa grain-store floor. Spilled stores are waste ŌĆö and clearing waste is a kind of work, if you set your hands to it.
- [narration] You: "There was a road. Grey rain. A name I can't hold. Is that the fever?"
- [narration] S┼Źan: "That is the blow talking, not a ghost. It will fade ŌĆö or it won't. Don't let the old women make a haunting of it."
- [milestone] Perk unlocked ŌĆö A Waking Fragment: A half-caught omen that bends fortune your way, though your step is slower to answer. (+1 LUCK / ŌłÆ1 AGI)
- [narration] Something surfaces and is gone ŌĆö a porter's knot, a road in grey rain, a name you cannot keep hold of.
- [narration] You: "A porter's knot. My hands know this much."
- [narration] Your fingers move before you decide to ŌĆö a labourer's memory, still in the muscle.
- [milestone] Perk unlocked ŌĆö The Porter's Hands: Hands that remember the work before the head does. (+1 STR / ŌłÆ1 LUCK)
- [narration] Genemon: On your feet, then. I am Genemon, steward of this house, and I keep the little it has left to keep. You'll not remember any of it, so hear it plain: the Kurosawa are samurai still ŌĆö on the lord's rolls, if nowhere in the granary.
- [narration] You: (You say nothing, and reach for the spilled rice.)
- [narration] Genemon: "...A man who works before he talks. Rare. We'll get on."
- [milestone] Perk unlocked ŌĆö Hands Before Words: A steady quickness that answers with work ŌĆö trusting to no luck. (+1 SPD / ŌłÆ1 LUCK)

**Save (base64 ŌĆö `__qa.load()` to reproduce):**
``

## 2026-07-05T00:29:06+0200 ŌĆö ok-so-for-the

**Note:**
Ok so for the progress on the rung the day-labourer

Its rendered as a percentage bar based on the actual numeric info 476/1100

I think this is showing too much raw info, like it's too in your face, there's a random ass number and it has to go up and when its high enough you rung up.

I think we want to show progress out of 100% broken out into internal rung requirements.

For example for R0 there could be 5 rung requirements 

 - Rake 100 spilled rice
 - Rake 200 spilled rice
 - ... 300
 - ... 400
 - ... 500

So as you rake spilled rice, the meter will jump to 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100% etc.

At 100% the rung up stuff progresses as normal.

I want to move away from a really dumb "x points to rung up" and "all activities give N points" and move towards

Rung up has a finite list of specific requirements that can be completed in arbitary order and as you do the bar moves up.

**Where:** seed 20260626 ┬Ę day 22 tick 2 ┬Ę kura ┬Ę R0 ┬Ę tier 0 ┬Ę tab work ┬Ę variants {} ┬Ę 1496├Ś718@2x ┬Ę url /
**Element:** button "Day-labourer µŚźķøćAnswer the summons ŌĆ║" ŌĆö "Day-labourer µŚźķøćAnswer the summons ŌĆ║" ┬Ę `div:nth-of-type(2) > header:nth-of-type(2) > div:nth-of-type(8) > button` ┬Ę @1259,39 199├Ś29
